title: Amor Eterno Knot Wrap
description: Celebrate Día de Muertos and honour your loved ones again and again with this reuseable Knot Wrap featuring a bold, bright and beautiful design.

images.alt: Amor Eterno Knot Wrap. The image shows a square, multicoloured fabric wrap with a symmetrical, folk-art Día De Muertos design. It features a central cross, two large flaming hearts with eyes, sugar skulls, and vibrant flowers and leaves.
The image shows the vibrantly coloured, Día De Muertos-themed Amor Eterno fabric knot wrap. The wrap is suspended mid-air on a vibrant pink background with blurred marigold flowers around the edge.

The image shows the colourful, Día De Muertos-themed Amor Eterno knot wrap tied around a square gift on a plinth. A colourful arch frames the scene, with sliced citrus and flowers surrounding the product on a reflective pink surface.
A super close-up image of the Dia De Muertos-themed, Amor Eterni fabric knot wrap. It focuses on the material texture, softness and colour vibrancy of the fabric wrap.
